title: AFI Enrichment Category Result — sentiment v1 (afi.enrichment.sentiment.v1)
description: The canonical output contract for the 'sentiment' open analysis lane: the ONE resolved result a sentiment provider/plugin contributes to the scorer-facing join (afi.enrichment.sentiment.v1). A provider-produced sentiment result MUST pass this validation at the provider-adapter edge BEFORE it reaches scoring (PBF-GOV D-PBF-8); a malformed result never reaches the scorer. The category marker MUST be 'sentiment'. Sentiment is modelled as a bounded set of explicit, typed, normalized AXES — not a single vague free-form score and not a provider-specific payload — so a future positioning-derived adapter (e.g. CFTC COT, funding rate, open interest, long/short ratio, implied volatility) or a locally classified narrative adapter can each contribute the same normalized shape at whatever cadence it measures. This mission ships the CONTRACT ONLY: no sentiment adapter is implemented here. The result carries no raw provider payload, no provider identity, no credential material, no scoring/UWR/rank/reward, and no Evidence provenance stamp.
$comment: BOUNDARY: category-result payload contract — validates a runtime category output, not a stored artifact; the discriminator is the 'category' marker. Referenced by the analysis-plugin outputSchemaRef 'afi.enrichment.sentiment.v1'. additionalProperties:false at every object level leaves no room for a raw provider payload, a credential-like field, a params bag, or a provider-specific id. Each axis is an explicit enum + normalized numeric — sentiment is NOT assumed to be textual, real-time, or measured on a single cadence.
x-afiPartOf: AFI Provider Adapter & BYOK Foundations v0.1 (PBF-GOV)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/provider-byok-foundations-v0.1 (PBF-GOV) D-PBF-2/D-PBF-8 — one resolved result per category; provider output passes canonical category validation before scoring

afi-governance/decisions/factory-configurable-pipelines-v1 (FCP-GOV) D-FCP-1/D-FCP-5 — the 'sentiment' open analysis lane; conforming providers/plugins are administrative registry updates, not per-participant governance

category.description: Category marker. MUST be 'sentiment' — the deterministic one-per-category join classifies contributions by this marker.

axes.description: Bounded set of explicit, typed, normalized sentiment axes. A provider contributes only the axes it measures; empty when none are available. Never a single free-form score.

axis.description: The sentiment dimension this observation measures. Provider-neutral: positioning (e.g. COT), funding, open interest, long/short ratio, implied volatility, or locally classified narrative.

score.description: Normalized directional sentiment in [-1,1] (-1 = maximally bearish, 0 = neutral, +1 = maximally bullish). Market-neutral.

confidence.description: OPTIONAL confidence in this axis in [0,1].

horizon.description: OPTIONAL cadence/horizon this axis was measured over. Sentiment is not assumed to be single-cadence.
